zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia Paynel於大約1135年出生在英國越可爾胡頓 帕格爾時，她的父親William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax46歲，母親Avice le Meschin22歲。她於1150年之前與Richard de Courcy在英國越可爾德拉結婚。她去世於1182年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德享年48歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia Paynel于大约1135年出生在英国越可爾胡頓 帕格爾时，她的父亲William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax46岁，母亲Avice le Meschin22岁。她于1150年之前与Richard de Courcy在英国越可爾德拉结婚。她去世于1182年在英国英格兰薩默塞特易亞斯特 全藍托潔黑阿德享年48岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Paynel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia Paynel was born about 1135, in Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, England, her father, William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax, was 46 and her mother, Avice le Meschin, was 22. She married Richard de Courcy before 1150, in Drax, Yorkshire, England. She died in 1182, in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia Paynel est née environ 1135, à Hooton Pagnell, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Avice le Meschin, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Courcy avant 1150, à Drax, Everwyck, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1182, à East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia Paynel um 1135 in Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax 46 und ihre Mutter Avice le Meschin 22. Sie hat vor 1150 in Drax, Yorkshire, England Richard de Courcy geheiratet. Sie starb 1182 im Alter von 48 Jahren in East Quantoxhead, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Paynel è nata il circa 1135 nel Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Avice le Meschin, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Courcy prima del 1150, nel Drax, Yorkshire, England. Morì nel 1182, nel East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia Paynelが約1135年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホーオトン プアグネルで生まれた時，父William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Draxは46歳，母Avice le Meschinは22歳であった。1150年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアドラックスでRichard de Courcyと結婚した。彼女は1182年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトエアスト クアントクスヘドで48歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Paynel(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 요르크실르 후턴 파그넬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice le Meschin(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1150년 이전 영국 요르크실르 드라스에서 Richard de Courcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 이스트 퀄토스헤드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Paynel nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Avice le Meschin, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Courcy antes 1150, em Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1182, em East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia Paynel родилась около 1135 г. в местности хутон пагнелл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William II Paynel, Sgr des Moutiers, Hambye, Drax было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice le Meschin, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Courcy перед 1150 г. в местности дракс, еркшир, Англия. Она умерла в 1182 г. в местности эаст куантоксхид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

Se casó con Richard de Courcy antes de 1150, en Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1182, en East Quantoxhead, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
